script_text:
Here's a 60-second YouTube Shorts script:

**Hook (0s-3s)**
"Did you know that AI can now generate stunning artwork in just seconds? Welcome to the future of art!"

**Introduction (4s-10s)**
"Hey everyone, welcome back to my channel! Today, we're exploring the incredible world of AI-generated art. From paintings to sculptures, AI algorithms can now create breathtaking masterpieces that rival human creativity."

**Main Content (11s-40s)**
"@evolving.ai is a pioneer in this field, using machine learning to generate stunning artworks. Their AI model can learn from thousands of images, identifying patterns and styles to create unique pieces. From abstract to realistic, the possibilities are endless!"

**Example and Call-to-Action (41s-55s)**
"Check out this example of AI-generated art. Mind-blowing, right? If you want to see more, follow @evolving.ai for daily doses of
youtube_title: AI Tip You Need To Know #shorts
